summary: Iteration 67 Testing - 5 New Features: Notification Center, Certificate Generation, Report Builder, Revenue Forecasting, Student Portal. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All 5 features verified working with UI tests.
passed_tests: Backend: Super admin login successful
Backend: GET /api/notifications returns paginated response with items, unread_count, total, page, page_size
Backend: GET /api/notifications?page=1&page_size=10 pagination works
Backend: PUT /api/notifications/read-all marks all as read
Backend: POST /api/certificates/generate returns pdf_base64 and certificate record
Backend: Certificate generation requires student_name validation
Backend: GET /api/certificates returns list of generated certificates
Backend: GET /api/reports/collections returns 6 collections (leads, students, cs_upgrades, mentor_redeposits, users, certificates)
Backend: POST /api/reports/generate with leads collection returns rows and total
Backend: Report generation with filters works correctly
Backend: Report generation rejects invalid collection
Backend: GET /api/forecasting/revenue returns historical, forecast, metrics, pipeline
Backend: Reports endpoint requires authentication
Backend: Forecasting endpoint requires authentication
Backend: Certificates endpoint requires authentication
Frontend: Home page loads with module icons and KPIs
Frontend: Notification bell icon visible in header
Frontend: Notification panel opens with notifications list
Frontend: Revenue Forecast page renders with all KPIs (Avg Monthly, Recent 3M Avg, Conversion Rate, Pipeline Leads, Growth Trend)
Frontend: Revenue Trend & Forecast chart displays
Frontend: Revenue Breakdown by Source chart displays
Frontend: Projected Revenue table shows 3 months forecast
Frontend: Sales Pipeline table displays
Frontend: Monthly Revenue History table displays
Frontend: Report Builder page renders with collection selector
Frontend: Report Builder shows 6 data sources (Leads/Sales, Students, CS Upgrades, Mentor Redeposits, Users/Staff, Certificates)
Frontend: Report Builder fields selection with checkboxes works
Frontend: Report Builder filters section with date range works
Frontend: Report Builder Run Report generates results (3233 records)
Frontend: Report Builder Export CSV button available
Frontend: Certificate page renders with form and preview area
Frontend: Certificate generation works - PDF generated
Frontend: Certificate Download PDF button works
Frontend: Certificate History shows generated certificates
Frontend: Student Portal page renders with iframe
Frontend: Student Portal iframe src is https://main.clt-academy.com/admin/students
Frontend: Student Portal 'Open in New Tab' button available
Frontend: Sidebar Finance section shows Revenue Forecast, Report Builder, Certificates
Frontend: Sidebar CS section shows Student Portal link
critical_code_review_comments: All 5 new features implemented correctly with proper data-testid attributes
Notification Center uses polling (30s interval) for real-time updates
Certificate PDF generation uses reportlab library with CLT Academy branding (red/black corners, dual signatures)
Report Builder supports 6 collections with field selection, filters, date range, and CSV export
Revenue Forecasting uses MongoDB aggregation over last 6 months with 3-month projections
Student Portal embeds external iframe with sandbox permissions
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_new_features_iteration67.py - New test file for 5 new features (15 tests)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Jane Smith and TEST_John Doe certificates during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: 5 new features fully tested and working: 1) Notification Center with bell icon in header, popover panel, mark read/all read functionality. 2) Certificate Generation with PDF download (reportlab), CLT Academy branding, dual signatures. 3) Report Builder with 6 collections (leads, students, cs_upgrades, mentor_redeposits, users, certificates), field selection, filters, CSV export. 4) Revenue Forecasting with 6-month historical data, 3-month projections, KPIs, charts. 5) Student Portal with iframe embedding main.clt-academy.com/admin/students. All features accessible from Finance section (Revenue Forecast, Report Builder, Certificates) and CS section (Student Portal) in sidebar.
